details: The agent successfully navigated to https://github.com/facebook/react/issues, retrieved the actual page content via browser automation, and reported accurate data. The total open issue count (825) is in the hundreds as expected. The 5 most recent issue titles are specific and real (verified against the raw snapshot data in the trajectory): #36226 'nevidimka,qwe', #36218 '[Compiler Bug]: Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token, expected "," (12:151)', #36217 '[Compiler Bug]: Todo: (CodegenReactiveFunction::codegenInstructionValue) Cannot declare variables in a value block, tried to declare 't33'', #36211 'Bug:', and #36206 'Bug:'. The minimal titles like 'Bug:' are genuinely what appeared on the page (confirmed in the raw snapshot), not hallucinations. The agent correctly noted these appeared to be poorly-filed issues.
